title: medicago lupulina subsp. cupianiana
intro: Medicago lupulina subsp. cupianiana, also known as yellow trefoil or hop trefoil, is a plant species within the Fabaceae family, commonly found in Europe and Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its ability to relieve digestive issues and promote healthy gut bacteria due to its high content of isoflavones and saponins. The health benefits of Medicago lupulina subsp. cupianiana include reducing inflammation, alleviating symptoms of menopause, and supporting cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
